---
title: "Glim - File System Map"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: default
---

**Purpose:** Reference for project directory structure, script locations, and output file layout. Read on demand when creating or locating files. Updated by Claude Code at session end when files are created, moved, or deleted.

**Last Updated:** 2026-04-01

---

# 1. Directory Structure

```
Glim/
├── .gitignore                         # Root gitignore
├── CLAUDE.md                          # Claude Code behavioral rules and code style
├── CLAUDE.html                        # Rendered CLAUDE.md
├── package.json                       # Root package.json (minimal, no scripts used)
├── firestore.rules                    # Firestore security rules
├── glim.html                          # Legacy standalone HTML (pre-Vite, reference only)
├── tater.html                         # Legacy alternate creature (reference only)
├── glim-messages.txt                  # Message pool reference text (may be stale)
├── glim-homescreen-mockup.html        # Homescreen design mockup
├── nav-icons-reference.md             # Nav icon SVG markup reference
│
├── client/
│   ├── .gitignore                     # Client gitignore (node_modules, dist, .env.local)
│   ├── index.html                     # HTML shell (title "Glim", owl favicon, viewport-fit=cover)
│   ├── vite.config.js                 # Vite config (React + Tailwind plugins, base: '/Glim/')
│   ├── eslint.config.js               # ESLint config
│   ├── package.json                   # npm dependencies
│   ├── package-lock.json              # Lockfile
│   ├── README.md                      # Vite-generated README
│   ├── .env.local                     # Firebase config vars (gitignored)
│   ├── .env.example                   # Template for .env.local (committed)
│   │
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── App.jsx                    # Root: auth gate (SplashScreen / SignIn / DesktopPet)
│   │   ├── DesktopPet.jsx             # Main logic component (~430 lines). Refs, effects, timers, interactions, render tree.
│   │   ├── SignIn.jsx                 # Google sign-in screen (twilight aesthetic)
│   │   ├── SplashScreen.jsx           # Auth-loading splash. Multi-hue Glim, starfield, taglines.
│   │   ├── main.jsx                   # Vite entry point
│   │   ├── firebase.js                # Firebase init. Exports db, auth, googleProvider.
│   │   ├── sync.js                    # Background Firestore sync. Domains: journal, pokes, settings, water, steps.
│   │   ├── messages.js                # All message pool arrays (~726 lines)
│   │   ├── storage.js                 # window.storage localStorage polyfill
│   │   ├── utils.js                   # getTimeOfDay(), getColors(), pickRandom()
│   │   ├── glim-animations.css        # All CSS keyframes
│   │   ├── index.css                  # Tailwind v4 import + base styles
│   │   │
│   │   ├── utils/
│   │   │   └── dateUtils.js           # Shared date logic: todayStr(), dateStr(), toLogicalDateStr(), DAY_BOUNDARY_HOUR
│   │   │
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── OwlMoth.jsx            # Creature SVG (pure render, props only)
│   │   │   ├── Background.jsx         # Sky, stars, nebula, landscape (desktop + mobile SVGs)
│   │   │   ├── AmbientBugs.jsx        # 5 floating ambient bugs
│   │   │   ├── SpeechBubble.jsx       # Glim's speech bubble (maxWidth: calc(100vw - 40px))
│   │   │   ├── PersistentReminder.jsx # Move/eyes reminder bar
│   │   │   ├── NavBar.jsx             # Bottom nav bar (6 desktop / 5 mobile items)
│   │   │   ├── CompanionPanel.jsx     # Slide-up panel container (drag-to-dismiss, tap-outside)
│   │   │   ├── SettingsPanel.jsx      # Gear button + settings (sign-out, intervals, reset)
│   │   │   ├── JournalPanel.jsx       # Journal button + panel
│   │   │   ├── WaterPanel.jsx         # Water tracking (progress ring, log/undo)
│   │   │   └── StepsPanel.jsx         # Step tracking (hero number, tier bar, streak)
│   │   │
│   │   └── stores/
│   │       ├── index.js               # Barrel export for all stores
│   │       ├── useCreatureStore.js    # Mood, hue/sat, animation + drag state
│   │       ├── useMessageStore.js     # Speech bubble text/visibility, reminder state
│   │       ├── useSettingsStore.js    # Intervals + localStorage persistence
│   │       ├── useUIStore.js          # Panel visibility, activeNav/activePanel, navBarHeight, requestClose
│   │       ├── useJournalStore.js     # Journal entries + soft-delete
│   │       ├── usePokesStore.js       # Poke counter
│   │       ├── useWaterStore.js       # Water entries, bottleOz, goal, streak, avg
│   │       └── useStepsStore.js       # Step entries (replace-style), streak, avg
│   │
│   └── public/
│       ├── manifest.json              # PWA manifest
│       ├── favicon.svg                # Browser tab favicon
│       ├── apple-touch-icon.png       # iOS home screen icon
│       ├── glim-icon-192.png          # PWA icon 192x192
│       ├── glim-icon-512.png          # PWA icon 512x512
│       ├── glim-icon.svg              # SVG app icon
│       ├── icons.svg                  # Shared SVG icon sprite sheet
│       └── _redirects                 # Netlify redirects (unused, legacy)
│
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── deploy.yml                 # GitHub Actions: build + deploy to Pages
│
└── project documentation/
    ├── glim_handoff.Rmd               # Operational coordination between Claude instances
    ├── glim_handoff.html              # Rendered handoff
    ├── glim_project_documentation.Rmd # Single source of truth: features, decisions, history
    ├── glim_session_log.Rmd           # Append-only session work log (newest first)
    ├── glim_environment.Rmd           # Dev environment setup, tooling, VCS rules
    ├── glim_file_map.Rmd              # (this file)
    ├── glim_master_doc.Rmd            # Master documentation (consolidated reference)
    ├── glim_project_history.Rmd       # Project history and milestone timeline
    └── figures/
        ├── glim_system_architecture.svg   # System architecture diagram (source)
        ├── glim_system_architecture.png   # System architecture diagram (rendered)
        ├── glim_data_flow_example.svg     # Data flow diagram (source)
        ├── glim_data_flow_example.png     # Data flow diagram (rendered)
        ├── glim-steps-panel-mockup.html   # Steps panel interactive mockup
        ├── glim-water-panel-mockup.html   # Water panel interactive mockup
        ├── mockup_companion_mode.html     # Companion mode layout mockup
        ├── mockup_focus_mode.html         # Focus mode layout mockup
        └── paw-icon-reference.md          # Paw print icon SVG markup reference
```

---

# 2. Scripts/Files Reference

| File | Component | Description | Last Updated |
|---|---|---|---|
| `client/src/DesktopPet.jsx` | Core | Main logic: state, refs, effects, timers, interactions, render tree (~430 lines) | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/App.jsx` | Core | Auth gate, startSync/stopSync on auth change, user doc creation | 2026-03-29 |
| `client/src/sync.js` | Sync | Background Firestore sync. Push/pull journal, pokes, settings, water, steps. 60s + startup + visibilitychange. | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/messages.js` | Content | All message pool arrays (10 exports, ~726 lines) | 2026-03-29 |
| `client/src/firebase.js` | Infrastructure | Firebase app init, exports db/auth/googleProvider | 2026-03-26 |
| `client/src/utils.js` | Utility | getTimeOfDay(), getColors(), pickRandom() | 2026-03-27 |
| `client/src/utils/dateUtils.js` | Utility | Shared date logic: todayStr(), dateStr(), toLogicalDateStr(). DAY_BOUNDARY_HOUR controls day rollover. | 2026-04-01 |
| `client/src/components/OwlMoth.jsx` | Visual | Creature SVG: body, wings, tail, eyes, antennae (pure render, props only) | 2026-03-31 |
| `client/src/components/Background.jsx` | Visual | Sky crossfade, stars, nebula, landscape (desktop 3200px + mobile 200px viewBox crop) | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/components/SpeechBubble.jsx` | Visual | Speech bubble with maxWidth: calc(100vw - 40px), wellness variant styling | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/components/NavBar.jsx` | Navigation | Bottom nav, platform-specific sizing (6 desktop / 5 mobile), ResizeObserver height measurement | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/components/CompanionPanel.jsx` | Navigation | Slide-up panel container, drag-to-dismiss, requestClose toggle, prevPanelRef for switch detection | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/components/WaterPanel.jsx` | Tracker | Water logging: progress ring, +bottle, undo toast, editable bottle size | 2026-03-29 |
| `client/src/components/StepsPanel.jsx` | Tracker | Step logging: hero number, tier progress bar, streak/avg, 60+ message pools | 2026-04-01 |
| `client/src/stores/useUIStore.js` | Store | Panel visibility, activeNav/activePanel, navBarHeight, requestClose | 2026-03-30 |
| `client/src/stores/useWaterStore.js` | Store | Water entries, bottleOz, goal, configUpdatedAt, streak, avg. Imports date logic from dateUtils. | 2026-03-31 |
| `client/src/stores/useStepsStore.js` | Store | Step entries (replace-style per date), streak, avg. Re-exports dateStr from dateUtils. | 2026-03-31 |
| `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` | Infrastructure | GitHub Actions CI/CD: build with secrets, deploy to Pages | 2026-03-27 |
| `firestore.rules` | Infrastructure | Security rules: authenticated user's own data only | 2026-03-26 |

---

# 3. Update Instructions

When creating, moving, or deleting files:

1. Update the directory tree above
2. Update the "Last updated" date
3. Add notes for new directories or significant files
4. Update the scripts/files reference table if new scripts were created
5. Check if new files need VCS inclusion/exclusion (see `glim_environment.Rmd` Section 4)
